terms.definition: An object representing the eventual result of an async operation; it is pending then settles once as fulfilled or rejected.
A function declared with async that always returns a Promise and can use await inside.
An operator that pauses an async function until a Promise settles, yielding its value or throwing its error.
A combinator that resolves when all given Promises fulfill, or rejects on the first rejection.
A combinator that waits for every Promise and reports each as fulfilled or rejected, never rejecting itself.
The mechanism that runs JavaScript's non-blocking concurrency, scheduling callbacks and resolved Promises.
